description: Electronic Signature & Timestamp Platform - Dual timestamp (time.copyright.al + OpenTimestamps/Bitcoin), public blockchain explorer, eIDAS/ETSI compliant, 2FA signing, API service, certificate generation, and template maker for electronic signatures.

userStories.title: Prisma schema - arkitektura e plote e databazes
userStories.description: Database schema qe mbulon te gjithe sistemin: perdorues me KYC, organizata, dokumenta, nenshkrime, certifikata, timestamp chain (server + BTC), API keys, templates, audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: Model User: id, email, name, password, role (USER/ADMIN/API_USER), kycStatus (PENDING/VERIFIED/REJECTED), kycDocumentUrl, totpSecret, totpEnabled, emailVerified, organizationId
Model Organization: id, name, domain, logo, certificateTemplate, apiQuota, plan (FREE/PRO/ENTERPRISE)
Model Document: id, title, fileName, fileHash (SHA-256), fileUrl, status (DRAFT/PENDING_SIGNATURE/PARTIALLY_SIGNED/COMPLETED/ARCHIVED), ownerId, organizationId
Model Signature: id, documentId, signerId, signerEmail, signerName, status (PENDING/SIGNED/REJECTED/EXPIRED), signedAt, signatureImageUrl, certificateId, position (JSON), order (int)
Model Certificate: id, userId, organizationId, serialNumber, subjectDN, issuerDN, publicKey, encryptedPrivateKey, validFrom, validTo, revoked, type (PERSONAL/ORGANIZATION/TSA)

Model TimestampEntry: id, sequenceNumber (auto-increment), fingerprint (SHA-256), sequentialFingerprint (SHA-256), type (SINGLE_FILE/SUBMITTED_HASH/SIGNATURE), serverTimestamp, btcTxId, btcBlockHeight, btcBlockHash, otsProof (bytes), otsStatus (PENDING/CONFIRMED), documentId, signatureId, previousEntryId (self-relation for chain)
Model ApiKey: id, key (hashed), name, organizationId, userId, permissions (JSON), rateLimit, lastUsedAt, expiresAt, active
Model SigningTemplate: id, name, description, fields (JSON - pozicionet e nenshkrimeve, fushat e formes), organizationId, userId, isPublic
Model SigningRequest: id, templateId, documentId, status, requesterEmail, recipientEmails (JSON), message, expiresAt
Model AuditLog: id, action, entityType, entityId, userId, ipAddress, userAgent, metadata (JSON), createdAt
Model VerificationCode: id, userId, code (6 digits), type (EMAIL/TOTP), expiresAt, used
Indexe per performance: TimestampEntry.sequenceNumber, TimestampEntry.fingerprint, Document.fileHash, AuditLog.createdAt
npx prisma generate ekzekutohet pa gabime
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Kjo eshte baza per te gjithe sistemin. TimestampEntry formon nje chain ku cdo entry lidhet me te meparshmen permes sequentialFingerprint = SHA256(previousSequentialFingerprint + currentFingerprint + serverTimestamp).

userStories.title: Autentifikim, regjistrim, dhe KYC verification
userStories.description: Sistem autentifikimi me NextAuth v5, regjistrim me email verification, KYC document upload per verifikim identiteti, dhe TOTP setup per nenshkrim.
acceptanceCriteria: NextAuth v5 me Credentials provider dhe Google OAuth
Faqe /auth/login me email/password form
Faqe /auth/register me emri, email, password, organizate (opsionale)
Email verification pas regjistrimit (6-digit code via Resend)
Faqe /settings/kyc per ngarkim dokument identiteti (foto ID/pasaporte)
KYC status display: PENDING, VERIFIED, REJECTED
Faqe /settings/security per aktivizim TOTP (Google Authenticator) - shfaq QR code, kerkon verifikim me 6-digit code
Middleware: route-t private kerkojne auth, nenshkrimi kerkon KYC verified + TOTP enabled
JWT session me role, kycStatus, totpEnabled
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Per te nenshkruar dokumente, perdoruesi DUHET te kete KYC te verifikuar DHE TOTP te aktivizuar. Per timestamp pa nenshkrim, mjafton llogaria.

userStories.title: Timestamp Engine - Server timestamp (time.copyright.al)
userStories.description: Motori i timestamp qe regjistron kohen e serverit tone, krijon fingerprint SHA-256, dhe nderton chain-in sekuencial ku cdo entry lidhet me te meparshmin.
acceptanceCriteria: Funksion createTimestamp(data, type) qe: 1) llogarit SHA-256 fingerprint, 2) merr timestamp nga serveri (UTC), 3) llogarit sequentialFingerprint = SHA256(prevSequentialFingerprint + fingerprint + timestamp), 4) ruan ne DB me sequenceNumber auto-increment
Funksion verifyChainIntegrity() qe verifikon qe cdo sequentialFingerprint eshte i sakte bazuar ne te meparshmin
API endpoint: POST /api/timestamp - pranon file ose hash, kthen TimestampEntry me ID, sequenceNumber, fingerprints, timestamp
API endpoint: GET /api/timestamp/:id - kthen detajet e nje timestamp entry
API endpoint: POST /api/timestamp/verify - pranon hash, verifikon nese ekziston ne chain
Server time sinkronizohet me NTP per saktesi
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Ky eshte timestamp-i jone (time.copyright.al). Chain sekuencial si ne foton e derguar: ID, Time Stamp (UTC), Fingerprint SHA-256, Type, Sequential Fingerprint SHA-256.

userStories.title: Bitcoin Timestamp - OpenTimestamps integration
userStories.description: Integrim me OpenTimestamps.org per te ankoruar timestamp-et tona ne blockchain-in e Bitcoin, duke provuar ekzistencen e dokumentit ne nje kohe te caktuar ne menyre te pavarur.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrim me OpenTimestamps API/library per te derguar SHA-256 hash
Pas dergimit, ruaj OTS proof (bytes) ne TimestampEntry.otsProof me status PENDING
Background job (cron ose polling) qe kontrollon cdo 10 minuta nese OTS proof eshte konfirmuar ne BTC blockchain
Kur konfirmohet: update btcTxId, btcBlockHeight, btcBlockHash, otsStatus = CONFIRMED
API endpoint: GET /api/timestamp/:id/btc - kthen statusin e BTC confirmation
Funksion verifyOtsProof(proof, hash) per verifikim te pavarur
Shfaqje ne UI: 'Pending BTC confirmation...' ose 'Confirmed in BTC Block #xxxxx (TxID: xxx...xxx)'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: OpenTimestamps eshte falas pa limit. Proof-i konfirmohet pas ~1-2 ore kur futet ne nje BTC block. Kjo jep garanci te pavarur blockchain per timestamp-et tona.

userStories.title: Public Timestamp Explorer (Blockchain Explorer)
userStories.description: Faqe publike real-time qe shfaq te gjitha timestamp-et, nenshkrimet, hash-et, dhe blloqet si nje blockchain explorer - e aksesueshme nga kushdo per verifikim.
acceptanceCriteria: Faqe /explorer publike (pa nevoje per llogari)
Tabele real-time me kolonat: ID, Time Stamp (UTC), Fingerprint (SHA-256), Type, Sequential Fingerprint (SHA-256), BTC Status
Auto-refresh cdo 5 sekonda ose WebSocket/SSE per updates real-time
Rreshtat e rinj shfaqen me animacion (highlight green si ne foto)
Klikim ne nje rresht hap detajet: hash-i plote, BTC block info, OTS proof, chain verification
Filter sipas type: single-file, submitted-hash, signature
Search me fingerprint hash
Paginim per historikun e plote
Link direkt per cdo entry: /explorer/:sequenceNumber
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Kjo eshte faqja publike si ne screenshot - shfaq te gjitha timestamps ne real-time. Kushdo mund te verifikoje qe nje hash ekziston ne chain-in tone dhe ne BTC blockchain.

userStories.title: Public Verify Page - Verifikim timestamp dhe nenshkrimesh
userStories.description: Faqe publike per verifikim te timestamp-eve dhe nenshkrimeve duke ngarkuar file, certifikate, ose duke futur SHA-256 fingerprint manualisht.
acceptanceCriteria: Faqe /verify publike me 4 menyra verifikimi (si ne foto):
1) Original File: ngarko file -> llogarit SHA-256 -> kerko ne chain -> shfaq rezultatin
2) Certificate: ngarko certifikate (.ots, .p7s) -> verifiko nenshkrimin
3) SHA-2 Fingerprint: fut hash manualisht -> kerko ne chain -> shfaq rezultatin
4) Offline Verification: udhezime per verifikim offline me OpenTimestamps CLI
Rezultati shfaq: I VLEFSHËM / I PAVLEFSHËM me detaje (kush, kur, BTC block, chain position)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Identike me seksionin 'Verify Time Stamp' ne foto - 4 menyra verifikimi.

userStories.title: 2-Step Signing Verification (Email OTP + TOTP)
userStories.description: Procesi i nenshkrimit kerkon 2 hapa verifikimi: fillimisht kod 6-shifror ne email, pastaj (per perdoruesit KYC-verified) kod nga Google Authenticator.
acceptanceCriteria: Kur perdoruesi klikon 'Nenshkruaj': Step 1 - dergon kod 6-shifror ne email (vlefshmerise 5 min)
UI: input per kodin e emailit me timer countdown
Pas verifikimit te kodit email: Step 2 - kerkon TOTP code nga Google Authenticator
UI: input per TOTP kodin (6 shifra)
Pas verifikimit te TOTP: nenshkrimi ekzekutohet
Nese perdoruesi nuk ka TOTP te aktivizuar: redirect ne /settings/security per ta aktivizuar
Nese perdoruesi nuk ka KYC te verifikuar: shfaq mesazh qe kerkohet KYC per nenshkrim
Rate limiting: max 5 tentativa per kod, max 3 dergime email per ore
AuditLog per cdo tentative (sukses/deshtim)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Kjo siguron qe vetem personi i duhur (KYC verified + email access + telefon me TOTP) mund te nenshkruaje. Perputhje me eIDAS per nenshkrime te avancuara.

userStories.title: Digital Signature Engine (eIDAS/ETSI compliant)
userStories.description: Motor nenshkrimi dixhital qe krijon nenshkrime te avancuara elektronike ne perputhje me eIDAS dhe ETSI EN 319 422 standards.
acceptanceCriteria: Gjenerim certifikatash X.509 per perdoruesit (node-forge) me: CN=emri, O=organizata, serialNumber=userId
Nenshkrim dixhital i PDF me PAdES (PDF Advanced Electronic Signatures) format
Suport per import certifikate .p12/.pfx nga perdoruesi
Cdo nenshkrim krijon automatikisht TimestampEntry ne chain (lidhet me SignatureId)
Verifikim nenshkrimi: kontrollo certifikaten, hash-in, timestamp-in, chain integrity
Metadata eIDAS ne nenshkrim: signing time, signing certificate, timestamp token
Certifikatat ruhen me private key te enkriptuar (AES-256)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: eIDAS Level: Advanced Electronic Signature (AdES). Per Qualified (QES) do duhet HSM dhe QTSP ne te ardhmen.

userStories.title: Signing Workflow & Ceremony
userStories.description: Workflow per dergim dokumentash per nenshkrim tek persona te tjere, me template dhe pozicionim drag-and-drop.
acceptanceCriteria: Forma per krijim signing request: zgjidh dokument, shto nenshkrues (email, emri, rendi)
Dergim email ftese me link unik per nenshkrim (Resend)
Faqe nenshkrimi /sign/:token - publike, pa nevoje llogari per pamje, por kerkon verifikim per nenshkrim
PDF viewer me drag-and-drop per vendosjen e nenshkrimit
Signature pad (vizatim me gisht/mouse) ose ngarkim imazh nenshkrimi
Per nenshkrues te jashtme (pa llogari): vetem email OTP verification
Per nenshkrues me llogari: email OTP + TOTP (2-step si US-007)
Notifikime email ne cdo hap: ftese, nenshkrim, perfundim
Status tracking: kush ka nenshkruar, kush eshte ne pritje
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Automatic Signature Seal / Vila e nenshkrimit
userStories.description: Vila vizuale automatike ne PDF qe permban info nenshkrimit, QR code per verifikim, dhe lidhje me chain-in publik.
acceptanceCriteria: Gjenerim automatik i viles ne PDF pas nenshkrimit
Vila permban: emri nenshkruesit, data/ora, SHA-256 hash, Timestamp ID, QR code
QR code lidhet me /explorer/:sequenceNumber per verifikim publik
3 template vila: Klasike (formale), Moderne (minimale), Zyrtare (me steme)
Pozicionim: ne vendin e zgjedhur ose automatikisht ne fund te faqes
Nese ka BTC confirmation: vila shfaq 'BTC Block #xxxxx'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: REST API v1 - eSign & Timestamp API per integrime
userStories.description: API publike e dokumentuar per organizata qe duan te integrojne nenshkrimin elektronik dhe timestamp ne sistemet e tyre.
acceptanceCriteria: API key management ne dashboard: gjenerim, revoke, permissions, rate limits
Auth: X-API-Key header
POST /api/v1/timestamp - krijo timestamp (file upload ose hash)
GET /api/v1/timestamp/:id - merr timestamp details + BTC status
POST /api/v1/timestamp/verify - verifiko hash
POST /api/v1/documents - ngarko dokument
POST /api/v1/documents/:id/signing-request - krijo kerkese nenshkrimi
GET /api/v1/documents/:id/status - status i dokumentit dhe nenshkrimeve
POST /api/v1/certificates/generate - gjenerimi i certifikates per organizate
Webhook callbacks per ndryshime statusi (document.signed, timestamp.btc_confirmed, etj)
Rate limiting: sipas planit (FREE: 100/day, PRO: 10k/day, ENTERPRISE: unlimited)
Response format JSON konsistent: { success, data, error, timestamp }
Error codes dhe mesazhe te qarta
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: API-ja mundeson organizatat te ndertojne mbi platformen tone.

userStories.title: Certificate Generation per organizata
userStories.description: Sistem per gjenerimin e certifikatave dixhitale per organizata dhe kompani qe duan te implementojne nenshkrimin elektronik.
acceptanceCriteria: Faqe /certificates per menaxhim certifikatash
Gjenerim certifikate organizate (X.509) me: O=OrgName, C=AL, validity period
Gjenerim certifikate individuale nen organizaten
Download certifikate ne format .p12/.pfx (me password)
Revoke certifikate me arsye
Certificate chain: Root CA (doc.al) -> Organization CA -> User Certificate
CRL (Certificate Revocation List) endpoint: GET /api/crl
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Platforma jone vepron si CA (Certificate Authority) per ekosistem.

userStories.title: Template Maker - Ndertuesi i formave te nenshkrimit
userStories.description: Sistem in-house ku cdo perdorues mund te ndertoje template per forma nenshkrimi elektronik, ti personalizoje, dhe ti perdore per klientet e tij.
acceptanceCriteria: Faqe /templates me listen e template-ve te krijuara
Template builder drag-and-drop me fushat: nenshkrim, date, tekst, checkbox, dropdown, ngarkim file
Vendosje fushash ne pozicione te caktuara ne PDF (coordinates x,y per cdo fushe)
Preview i template me te dhena shembull
Ruajtje template si JSON schema
Perdorim template: zgjidh template -> ngarko PDF -> ploteso fushat -> dergo per nenshkrim
Template publike (share me link) ose private
Clone template per modifikim
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Kjo i lejon bizneset te krijojne forma te personalizuara: kontrata, marreveshje, deklarata, etj.

userStories.title: Document Management & Signing Dashboard
userStories.description: Dashboard per menaxhim te dokumentave, nenshkrimeve ne pritje, dhe kerkesave - platforma qendrore per cdo perdorues.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout me sidebar: Dashboard, Dokumenta, Nenshkrime, Timestamp Explorer, Certifikata, Templates, API Keys, Settings
Dashboard: statistika (dokumenta totale, ne pritje, te perfunduar, timestamps kete muaj), grafik aktiviteti
Dokumenta: lista me search, filter (status, date), sort, paginim, drag-drop upload
Nenshkrime ne pritje: lista me aksione (nenshkruaj, refuzo, shiko)
Kerkesa derguar: tracking kush ka nenshkruar
Quick actions: ngarko dokument, krijo timestamp, dergo per nenshkrim
Responsive design per mobile/tablet/desktop
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Audit Log, historik, dhe eksport
userStories.description: Historik i plote i te gjitha veprimeve ne sistem per compliance dhe transparence.
acceptanceCriteria: Regjistrim automatik i cdo veprimi: upload, sign, verify, timestamp, login, API call
Faqe /audit-log me tabele: data, perdoruesi, veprimi, detaje, IP
Filtra: perdorues, veprim, date range, dokument
Eksport ne CSV dhe PDF
Per cdo dokument: timeline e plote e veprimeve
Retention policy: 7 vjet (eIDAS requirement)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Landing Page profesionale per www.doc.al
userStories.description: Faqe kryesore profesionale qe prezanton platformen, sherbimet, dhe cmimet.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section: 'Nenshkrim Elektronik & Timestamp i Besueshem' me CTA
Features: eSign, Timestamp (Server + Bitcoin), Public Chain Explorer, API, Template Maker, Certificate Authority
Si funksionon: 3 hapa vizuale (Ngarko -> Nenshkruaj -> Verifiko)
Timestamp Explorer preview live (mini-version e /explorer)
Pricing: Free (10 docs/muaj, 50 timestamps), Pro (unlimited docs, 1000 timestamps, API), Enterprise (white-label, unlimited, SLA)
Trust badges: eIDAS compliant, ETSI EN 319 422, Bitcoin anchored
Footer: links, kontakt, social, legal
Responsive, Lighthouse score > 90
Typecheck passes
